title: Steve Clan Modpack
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack that makes Minecraft feel fresh again. Expands upon all areas of the game and carefully rebalances items and progression.
body:
> # Steve Clan Modpack



The Steve Clan Modpack is a **Vanilla+** modpack that expands on **all aspects of the game**, to make them more interesting and fun to interact with. The pack also includes a lot of **funny / joke mods** to keep the experience light-hearted and especially fun with friends.


The modpack is currently still a work in progress. It and the project page will be updated as time goes on. 
You can check out some of the highlight changes of the modpack here:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
</details>

If you find any issues or have suggestions for the pack feel free to open an issue on GitHub or message me on Discord @rvg.nin.


> ### Extras
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Recommended Content
The following mods are not allowed to be included in modpacks, but are recommended for the best experience:

- **Clickable advancements** [Clickable Advancements](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clickable-advancements)

### Credits
The following mods / resource packs are included in the pack and are required to be credited:

- **GUI** [Pink Hearts and Bread](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pink-hearts-and-bread) with modified Yellow Hearts and custom AppleSkin compatibility
- **Recolourful Containers** [Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD (DARK)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui-hud-dark)

</details>
